title: caralluma geniculata
intro: Caralluma geniculata, also known as Indian Karvanda, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Caralluma geniculata include appetite suppression, weight loss, and improved glycemic control, making it a potential natural remedy for managing obesity and diabetes. Caralluma geniculata is often used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, due to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids.
